title: Foreign crew members of sunken ship MSC ELSA-3 move Kerala HC for permission to return to home countries
description: A petition has been moved before the Kerala High Court by seven foreign crew members of the sunken vessel MSC ELSA-3 seeking the return of the passports and permission to return to their home countries [Ivanov Alexander & ors v Union of India & ors].MSC ELSA-3, is a Liberia-flagged cargo ship carrying diesel, bunker oil, calcium carbide (a reactive chemical) and plastic nurdles, sank off the Kochi coast in May 2025. The incident led to severe marine pollution. Lawsuits followed. Those wh
